tools_used: metrics/statpack.md (modern cert base rates, relist/CVSG/circuit cuts)

notes: Forward cell, fresh same-day snapshot; retrieval degraded gracefully to provisioned inputs plus corpus priors after the MCP docket searches returned nothing SCOTUS-side.
